docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAY-11-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WHITEHEAD, PAMELA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF SEP-08-2021. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO INCREASE AMOUNT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASJIM, PRITA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-24-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRITA HASJIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAMELA WHITEHEAD IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-24-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
